dropzone.title: Drop image here
dropzone.hint: JPEG · PNG · WebP · GIF · TIFF — processed 100% locally
dropzone.unsupported: This file does not look like a supported image.

home.heroBadge: 100% client-side — nothing ever leaves your device
home.heroSubtitle: The open-source EXIF / XMP / IPTC editor that runs entirely in your browser. View every hidden field, edit or wipe it, and optionally hide AES-256 encrypted records inside your images.

local.title: Privacy first
local.desc: No uploads, no cookies, no tracking. Files are processed in memory and never touch a server — there is no server.

editor.title: Full metadata editor
editor.desc: EXIF, XMP with custom namespaces, IPTC and PNG text chunks. Edit, add, rename and delete any field.

vault.title: Encrypted vault
vault.desc: Hide passwords, tokens or notes inside an image using AES-256-GCM and PBKDF2 — powered by the Web Crypto API.

cleaner.title: One-click cleaner
cleaner.desc: Strip GPS location, camera info and every other trace in one click. Pixels are never recompressed.

offline.title: Works offline
offline.desc: Installable PWA. After the first visit everything works with no internet connection at all.

open.title: Open source
open.desc: MIT-licensed and auditable. Verify yourself that nothing leaves your device.

how.title: How it works
how.step1: Drop an image — it is read directly into browser memory.
how.step2: Inspect and edit metadata, clean it, or encrypt a secure record into it.
how.step3: Download the result. The original pixels are copied byte-for-byte.

editor.noImageDesc: Drop an image on the home page to inspect and edit its metadata.

overview.encryptedDesc: This image contains a MetaCrypt secure record. Open the Vault to decrypt it.

table.invalidValue: Invalid value for this field type
table.confirmDeleteAll: Delete ALL fields in this section?

exif.empty: No EXIF data in this image.
exif.readOnly: EXIF editing is supported for JPEG files. For this format the data is shown read-only.

xmp.empty: No XMP packet in this image.
xmp.readOnly: XMP editing is supported for JPEG and PNG files.
xmp.nsHint: Custom namespaces are supported — e.g. https://example.com/ns/1.0/
xmp.vaultManaged: This packet contains the MetaCrypt encrypted payload — manage it on the Vault page.

iptc.empty: No IPTC data in this image.
iptc.readOnly: IPTC editing is supported for JPEG files.

png.empty: No textual chunks in this PNG.
png.notPng: PNG text chunks only exist in PNG files.
png.xmpNote: The XMP packet (iTXt · XML:com.adobe.xmp) is managed on the XMP tab.

raw.noXmp: This image has no XMP packet.

cleaner.title: Metadata Cleaner
cleaner.desc: Remove selected metadata families. Pixels are copied byte-for-byte — no recompression, no quality loss.
cleaner.iccWarning: Removing the ICC profile can slightly change how colors are displayed.
cleaner.vaultWarning: Removing XMP will also destroy the MetaCrypt encrypted record stored in this image.
cleaner.unsupported: Cleaning is supported for JPEG and PNG files.

export.title: Export metadata
export.desc: Save everything this image contains as a document.
export.importDesc: Accepts MetaCrypt JSON or XML exports. Writable sections (XMP, PNG text) are applied to the image.
export.importError: Could not read this file — expected a MetaCrypt JSON or XML export.

compat.title: Compatibility checker
compat.desc: What happens to this image's metadata when it is shared through:

notes.reencoded: Re-encodes images on upload — all metadata is stripped.

compat.vaultDanger: Your encrypted record would be destroyed

vault.title: Secure Vault
vault.desc: Create a secure record, encrypt it with AES-256-GCM and hide it inside your image's metadata. Everything happens in your browser — the password and data never leave this device.
vault.needImage: Load an image first — the encrypted record is stored inside the image file itself.
vault.loadForVault: Drop an image to create a vault, or one that already contains a MetaCrypt record to decrypt it.
vault.detectedDesc: Enter the password to decrypt the secure record stored in this image.
vault.iterationsHint: Higher is slower to brute-force. 600 000 is the recommended default.
vault.algoNote: AES-256-GCM · PBKDF2-SHA256 · random salt & IV · Web Crypto API
vault.encrypted: Record encrypted and embedded into the image. Download it to keep the result.
vault.wrongPassword: Could not decrypt. Check the password and try again.
vault.removed: Encrypted record removed from the image.
vault.emptyRecord: Fill in at least one field to encrypt.
vault.unsupportedFormat: Embedding requires a JPEG or PNG image.

errors.xmpTooLarge: The XMP packet is too large to fit into a JPEG segment (64 KB max).

footer.privacy: Your files never leave this device.
footer.madeWith: No backend · No uploads · No tracking
